title: arenaria capillaris var. glandulifera
intro: Arenaria capillaris var. glandulifera, also known as glandular white sandwort, is a plant species within the carnation family that is native to China. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Arenaria capillaris var. glandulifera include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Arenaria capillaris var. glandulifera can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
